settings.subtext:
Pause & Indulge

Whether you're looking for a quick weekday treat, an impressive dinner party dessert, or a creative way to enjoy your favourite Café Enrista products, you've come to the right place. Our recipe collection brings together simple, delicious ideas crafted around the Jumbo Brands range, from indulgent hot chocolate creations and velvety coffee desserts to flavour-packed snacks and everyday family favourites.

Each recipe is designed with real South African kitchens in mind: easy-to-follow, made with accessible ingredients, and packed with the quality and value that Jumbo Brands stands for. Bookmark this page and come back often, we add new recipes regularly, so there's always something fresh to discover and enjoy.
